title: Fragariastrum doerfleri
intro: Fragariastrum doerfleri, also known as Doerfler's strawberry bush, is a perennial plant species belonging to the family Rosaceae. The plant is valued for its potential health benefits, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, which may aid in relieving symptoms of digestive issues, wounds, and infections. Bioactive constituents of Fragariastrum doerfleri include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenes, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. Traditionally, Doerfler's strawberry bush is used in herbal medicine, often formulated into teas, infusions, and tinctures, as well as being used topically for skin issues and as a mouthwash for oral health.
